chunks.text: The EECS Department offers students the opportunity to receive a truly outstanding education in the broad field of information science and technology. Your generous support can help sustain and expand our public university programs to prepare all of our students to become tomorrow’s engineering leaders.
A gift to the EECS Excellence Fund extends Berkeley’s long-standing leadership and excellence in education and research in Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences.

Your donation to CS Scholars supports our members by providing funding for academic opportunities such as tutoring and advising, community-building opportunities such as peer mentoring, professional development, and funding for students to travel to attend national research conferences.
Help recruit teachers and guest speakers, host students, and develop curricular materials for a one-week class designed to introduce inexperienced students to computer science.
If you have any questions about making a gift to EECS, please contact gifts@eecs.berkeley.edu.
